title: lepidium oxytrichum
intro: Lepidium oxytrichum, also known as desert cress or wild cress, is a type of annual herb that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium oxytrichum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as supporting digestion and immune function. Lepidium oxytrichum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
